name.zh: 中华人民共和国司法部

description.en: Official legal and judicial statistics from China's Ministry of Justice (MOJ). Covers data on lawyers and law firms, notarization services, legal aid, judicial expertise, community corrections, prison populations, and rule-of-law construction. Publishes annual statistical bulletins on the justice system, including the number of registered attorneys, legal aid recipients, arbitration cases, and administrative law enforcement activities.
description.zh: 中国司法部发布的官方法制与司法统计数据，涵盖律师与律师事务所、公证服务、法律援助、司法鉴定、社区矫正、监狱人口及法治建设情况。发布年度司法行政统计公报，包括注册律师人数、法律援助受援人数、仲裁案件及行政执法活动等数据。

en: Annual statistics on registered lawyers, law firms, and legal practitioners across China
Legal aid case volume: criminal defense, civil litigation, administrative cases by province
Notarization service statistics: number of notarizations, types, and regional distribution
Judicial expertise institutions and appraisal case statistics
Community corrections data: persons under supervision, offense types, rehabilitation outcomes
Prison population statistics: incarcerated persons, types of offenses, release records
Administrative law enforcement inspection and penalty records
Legal education and rule-of-law publicity campaign data
zh: 全国注册律师、律师事务所及法律从业人员年度统计
法律援助案件量：刑事辩护、民事诉讼、行政案件（含分省数据）
公证服务统计：公证件数、类别及地区分布
司法鉴定机构与鉴定案件数量统计
社区矫正数据：在矫人员数量、犯罪类型、矫正效果
监狱人口统计：服刑人员数量、犯罪类型、释放记录
行政执法检查与处罚记录
法治宣传教育活动数据
